name: businessportfolio
description: Root workspace for aglportfolio frontend and backend server

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "client,server" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix aglportfolio" "npm run dev --prefix server"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix aglportfolio ; npm run build --prefix server
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix aglportfolio ; npm install --prefix server
